characters.appearance: Older woman with a slim build and fair complexion. She has long, wavy gray hair and wears black-rimmed glasses. She has extensive tattoos on her neck and chest.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: रोज़ सिर्फ दस मिनट Supernova पर English practice करो। [Practice English for just ten minutes a day on Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hook: Establishes a clear, achievable daily goal (10 minutes).
- Emotion: Encouraging and practical, setting a low barrier to entry.
- Payoff: Positions Supernova as the go-to tool for daily English improvement.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ 10 मिनट SUPERNOVA पर ENGLISH PRACTICE करो
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others." - one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: All animals are equal,
Unknown speaker says: equal - बराबर [equal - equal]
Unknown speaker says: but some animals are more important than others.
Unknown speaker says: important - ज़रूरी [important - important]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Purpose: Demonstrates the app's interactive learning feature in real-time.
- Emotion: Helpful and supportive, acting like a personal tutor.
- Payoff: Shows how easily users can learn new vocabulary in context.

- Payoff: Reinforces the habit-building aspect of the app with continuous, guided learning.
